# LLMS.txt
# This file provides information for LLMs about this project.

## Project: Bandi Fotovoltaico
A professional service for analyzing public tenders and tax incentives in the photovoltaic sector, specifically for the Marche region, Italy.

## Target Audience
Photovoltaic professionals, installers, and consultants.

## Core Service
- Analysis of public tenders (Bandi).
- Tax incentive monitoring (Agevolazioni fiscali).
- Paid newsletter subscription.
- Focus on Marche region and national public procurement.
